name: Unfried French Fries (Caviness)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes until tender, about 20 minutes.
2. Peel the potatoes or leave them unpeeled.
3. Cut the potatoes into fries.
4. Place the fries on a non-stick cookie sheet or spray a regular cookie sheet with PAM.
5. Lightly sprinkle with salt if desired, or your favorite seasoning.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 45-60 minutes, turning them over once halfway through the cooking time.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
